hero.name: Yishai Kaminsky
hero.title: Software Developer & AI Architect
hero.subtitle: Building intelligent systems with AI agents, multi-agent orchestration, and full-stack development. Creator of 70+ projects spanning cybersecurity, automation, and cutting-edge AI.

about.title: About Me
about.bio: I'm a software developer with a passion for AI and intelligent automation. With a background spanning cybersecurity platforms, IT management, and enterprise support, I spend my time building AI-powered systems that solve real problems — from multi-agent orchestration platforms with 50+ specialized agents to smart CRM systems, collaborative task managers, and automated research tools.
about.bio2: With experience at Microsoft and a background spanning full-stack development, mobile apps, and AI/ML, I bridge the gap between complex AI capabilities and practical, user-friendly applications. I'm especially passionate about Hebrew-first AI tools and making technology accessible.

contact.title: Get in Touch
contact.subtitle: Have a project in mind or want to collaborate? I'd love to hear from you.
